title: alophia silvestris
intro: Alophia silvestris, also known as Desert Marigold or Mexican Marigold, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is valued for its vibrant orange and yellow flowers, as well as its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant's health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Alophia silvestris include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
